summary: @rasbt: The MiniMax M2 series was one of the most widely used open-weight LLM series earlier this year. Now, we got a technical
whyItMatters: The MiniMax M2 series was one of the most widely used open-weight LLM series earlier this year. Now, we got a technical report with some interesting tidbits. I summarized some of them below: 1. Full attention as an anti-trend?: They tried hybrid sliding-window attention variants (like so many others, like Xiaomi MiMo, Laguna, Gemma 4, Arcee, Olmo 3, etc.).…
